title: Dying Sol
description: The world is a furnace, and you're the fuel-- Survive an intensifying Solar Apocalypse as the sun approaches an end to its life cycle.
body:
# !["The world is a furnace, and you're the fuel."](https://i.imgur.com/rcSR3gU.png)
**The Sun is approaching the end of its lifespan, and time is limited. Resist your certain demise and survive the improbable, as you race against a dying star.**

***Dying Sol*  is a challenge-oriented modpack, placing the player in a race for survival against a dying Sun. Given a mere week before the apocalypse begins, it is your goal to collect what resources you can, before you're pushed to live permanently underground. Will you survive and thrive, or are you destined to be baked alive in unrelenting heat of the Sun?**

**This pack is designed to work alone or with friends. Work closely with your allies, or brave the Solar Apocalypse alone. Either way, good luck⸺ you'll need it.**

![The sun is incinerating a forest.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/D1u6u5Ey/images/d476ae18783bfd1c18c89516270dbac26c92eff2.png)

# Features:
- A deathly Solar Apocalypse, thanks to the [Solar Apocalypse](https://modrinth.com/mod/solar-apocalypse) mod by [SmushyTaco](https://modrinth.com/user/SmushyTaco)!
- Terrain quality is greatly improved through [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), with significant atmospheric immersion through [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) and [Effectual](https://modrinth.com/mod/effectual)!
- Tons of QOL enhancements and performance boosts. Performance boosts are attributed to [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) whilst QOL content is provided through a handful of mods made by [Serilum](https://modrinth.com/user/Serilum)!
- A small handful of **original content**, created by [EpicEbic](https://modrinth.com/user/EpicEbic) (me!) exclusively for the *Dying Sol* modpack. Currently, there's a custom title screen, a custom guidebook, as well as custom in-game dialogue that dynamically reacts to how long you survived before dying!
# Version
!["Only for Fabric 1.21.7"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ceedbcd3d371be02901b1d7b6425459bcf37f7d.png)
**This pack is only available for Fabric 1.21.7! I have no plans to port this pack to Forge or to other versions of Fabric.**
# Support
I do all of my content for free and for fun, without any intentions of turning a profit. However, if you want to show appreciation or help fund future mod development, feel free to visit my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/ebicc) and chip in. Every cent counts! :)
